# Sample Etruscan inscriptions for testing
# One inscription per line, various transcription systems
#
# Lines starting with # are comments and will be skipped

# CIE-style (all uppercase)
LARTHAL LECNES
ARNTH VELCHAS
AULE SPURINAS

# Philological style
Larθal Velχas
Ramθa Matunai
Velθur Larisal Ceicnas

# Mixed/web-safe
Larthal Spurinas
Arnth Cuclnies
